hook: A national-team inspired football arena skin for tournament season without real flags, crests, players, or FIFA marks.
positioning: stadium lights, abstract jersey stripes, tournament-night energy, command-center scoreboard accents

requiredShape.marketplacePreview: 16:9 horizontal Codex-like full workspace + right-side emotional hero/world art + themed sidebar/main/composer + skin chip + Remix / Customize CTA
requiredShape.liveLayout: right 42% emotional art/world zone; left/center functional surfaces protected by pale frosted panels; composer accent ring with stable text

generationPrompts.marketplacePreview: Marketplace preview for Football Nation Arena: horizontal 16:9 benchmark-style Codex Desktop skin preview, Codex-like desktop window occupies 52-72% left/center, visible app chrome/sidebar/main workspace/AI side panel/task cards/bottom composer, right-side emotional art zone: Right 42% becomes a generic football arena with floodlights, original abstract jersey stripe ribbons, pitch-line geometry and scoreboard-like UI blocks; no flag/crest/player. Category chip and Remix / Customize CTA visible. Palette canvas #F6FFF8, panelSoft #E4F4E9, panelWhite #FFFFFF, textPrimary #102418, mutedText #506B58, accent #16A34A, accentAlt #F59E0B, glow #D6F8DE, border #C8E4CF, heroInk #073D21. Premium PC workspace product, not a poster, not a wallpaper, not plain color. IP safety negative prompt: no national flag, no club crest, no FIFA/World Cup marks, no real player likeness, no jersey sponsor/logo, no official tournament typography, no competitor image.
generationPrompts.liveBackground: Live background for Football Nation Arena: UI-free low-detail atmospheric background only, right 42% emotional hero/world art, calm left/sidebar and bottom composer safe zones for readability scrims. Decompose into background + optional hero/ornament layer + surface/accent tokens. No baked text, no logos, no real person/team/franchise marks. Mood: stadium lights, abstract jersey stripes, tournament-night energy, command-center scoreboard accents. Negative prompt: no national flag, no club crest, no FIFA/World Cup marks, no real player likeness, no jersey sponsor/logo, no official tournament typography, no competitor image.

ipSafetyNotes.publicSafeVersion: Right 42% becomes a generic football arena with floodlights, original abstract jersey stripe ribbons, pitch-line geometry and scoreboard-like UI blocks; no flag/crest/player.
ipSafetyNotes.bannedSubjectMatter: no national flag, no club crest, no FIFA/World Cup marks, no real player likeness, no jersey sponsor/logo, no official tournament typography, no competitor image
ipSafetyNotes.rightsNotes: Original programmatic vector-style composition generated locally with Playwright/CSS. No third-party artwork, real celebrities, anime/game characters, team crests, FIFA/World Cup marks, player likenesses, logos, competitor images, or external assets used.
ipSafetyNotes.builderCopyReminder: Use images you own or have rights to. Do not redistribute copyrighted celebrity, anime, sports team, or player artwork without permission.

qaNotes: Owner-review concept batch only; no real Codex Desktop apply per brief.
Crops are simulated Codex overlay crops, not CDP evidence.
If selected, next step is decompose into .dreamskin/manual kit and run real Install/Apply/Verify/Restore.
